impact: This gives the PP&D supervisor a deterministic recovery policy for SyntaxError, py_compile, and TypeScript parser failures: stop broad retries, require smaller one-file proposals, add syntax-first preflight diagnostics, and select fixture-first validation work before implementation. That should reduce repeated rollback cycles and steer workers toward syntactically valid patches.
summary: Add supervisor repair guidance for repeated syntax and compile validation rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 5 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
